title: Grilled Nectarine Skewers with Arabian Spice
description: A sweet and tangy dessert made with nectarine, perfect for warm weather. Inspired by the flavors of Saudi Arabia.

ingredients.name: arabian spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at most Middle Eastern markets

instructions: Thread nectarine pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a small bowl, mix together Arabian spice blend and tangy honey.
Brush the spice mixture evenly onto both sides of the nectarine pieces.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the nectarine is caramelized and tender.
